name: Asmo Corporation
summary: Asmo Corporation imports and sells meat products. It provides meals in various fields, such as hospital meals, office meals, school meals, and welfare facility meals for the elderly. The company also offers nursing care services; manages 10 Japanese restaurants in Hong Kong; and provides insurance products. Additionally, it engages in trust business, such as management of property for the elderly and maintenance of lump-sum payment for paid elderly home. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. Asmo Corporation is a subsidiary of PersonsBridge Co., Ltd.
